SEE PAZDERKA V. CABALLEROS DIMAS ALANG, INC., (1998) 62 CAL.APP.4TH 658; ZAMORA V. CLAYBORN CONTRACTING GROUP, INC., (2002) 28 CAL.4TH 249, 259-260. REPORTER: PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193

LAW AND MOTION 302, AMENDED NOTICE OF MTN TO TAX COSTS, ARGUED, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO TAX: COURT REJECTS BUSSEY REASONING AND GRANTS MOTION TO TAX IN PART. THE COURT STRIKES (1) $210.50 FOR TRANSCRIPTS UNDER CCP 1033.5(B)(5); (2) $282.50 FOR EXPERT WITNESS FEES UNDER CCP 1033.5(B)(1); (3) $1,211.80 FOR PHOTOCOPYING, $95.91 FOR POSTAGE, $12.61 IN PHONE, $78.69 FOR NEXT DAY MAIL, AND $121.00 IN FAX UNDER CCP 1033.5(B)(3); (4) $16.00 IN BRIDGE TOLLS UNDER LADAS V. CSAA, (1993) 19 CAL.APP.4TH 761, 775; (5) $50.20 IN COMPUTER RESEARCH UNDER LADAS V. CSAA, (1993) 19 CAL.APP.4TH 761, 776. UNDER CCP 1033.5(C)(4), THE COURT AWARDS $460.00 IN MESSENGER FEES. SEE LADAS V. CSAA, (1993) 19 CAL.APP.4TH 761, 776. UNDER CRC 26, THE COURT STRIKES ALL OF THE APPELLATE COSTS EXCEPT FOR THE $231.38 FOR PRODUCTION OF ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. ADDITIONAL COSTS OF $115 MOTION, $336 DEPOSITION, AND $340 MESSENGER FEES ALLOWED. $30.50 EXHIBIT TABS DENIED. REPORTER: PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193
